历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 10504 → 9437 → 11735 → 23896 → 7667. In 2024, there was a severe break (23896), and in 2025 it quickly rebounded to 7667, returning to around the 2022 level. In the past 5 years, fluctuations were large but stabilized in 2025. The enrollment plan for Inner Mongolia Science/Physics Category: 2021: 49, 2022: 50, 2023: 51, 2024: 50, 2025: 50; 2026 plan: 53, an increase of 3 (+6%) compared to 2025, a small expansion with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 62nd, with recent rankings stable in the 48–62 range, a mid-to-upper level science and engineering university. From 2021 to 2026, there were no records of reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity ranking, or abnormal filing, indicating no significant negative public opinion or cold events in recent years, stable social attention, and stable psychological expectations for applicants. The university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering as traditional advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Traditional engineering majors like petroleum engineering and chemical engineering have average social popularity, but energy and power majors have seen increased popularity in recent years. In 2026, Inner Mongolia Physics Category candidates are approximately 110,800, an increase of about 32.3% from 83,716 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Inner Mongolia candidates. The enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is relatively stable (about 50), accounting for a small proportion, and regional preference factors have a neutral impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7667, the slight easing effect of a 6% expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition from a 32.3% increase in Inner Mongolia Physics Category candidates, the 2026 admission ranking is expected to move slightly forward (harder to enter). Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 7793, with a fluctuation range of 7293–8293.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7293–8293, it is recommended to mainly fill Tier 2, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<7300), focus on sprinting for popular majors like Electronic Information Engineering and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (about 7700–8000), mainly choose core majors like Petroleum Engineering and Energy and Power Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>8100), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety to ensure admission.
